title: Dr. Öğr. Üyesi Sezin Öner Yaman’a TÜBİTAK 3005 Programından Proje Desteği

Türkçe

Faculty of Economics, Administrative and Social Sciences, Department of Psychology. Prof. Sezin Öner Yaman’s project titled “Investigation of Individual and Event-Based Factors that Play a Role in the Detection of Fake News in the Context of Gender News” has been entitled to be supported under the TÜBİTAK 3005 program.

The proposed study will focus on real events related to gender, both those that never happened and those whose content has been altered. Accordingly, the main aim of the project is to focus on gender-related news in the three proposed studies and to determine to what extent the memory illusions developed towards these fake news are affected by individual and event-based differences.

We congratulate Sezin and wish her success in her research.
